subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to compute quarter-over-quarter spend change for Adobe and Microsoft publishers in 2024, and rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend. Query should return publisher, product, quarterly spend by Q1-Q4, QoQ change percentages, and Q4 product rank within publisher.

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query required to analyze multi-quarter spend data across two publishers with ranking and growth calculations. This is a frontier-tier task because it requires: (1) quarterly aggregation and pivoting of spend data across 2024, (2) window functions (ROW_NUMBER) to rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend, (3) year-over-year period-to-period change calculations (QoQ %), and (4) filtering/grouping across multiple dimensions (publisher, product, quarter). This complexity justifies a single frontier-tier sql_gen subtask rather than splitting into multiple queries. No cross-source reconciliation is needed; the data is single-source SQL warehouse lookups.

output.sql: WITH quarterly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS quarterly_amount FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft') AND event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' AND fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4) GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter), pivoted_quarters AS (SELECT publisher, product, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_amount END), 0) AS q1_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_amount END), 0) AS q2_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_amount END), 0) AS q3_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_amount END), 0) AS q4_spend FROM quarterly_spend GROUP BY publisher, product), qoq_changes AS (SELECT publisher, product, q1_spend, q2_spend, q3_spend, q4_spend, CASE WHEN q1_spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((q2_spend - q1_spend) / q1_spend * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q1_to_q2_change_pct, CASE WHEN q2_spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((q3_spend - q2_spend) / q2_spend * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q2_to_q3_change_pct, CASE WHEN q3_spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((q4_spend - q3_spend) / q3_spend * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q3_to_q4_change_pct FROM pivoted_quarters), ranked_products AS (SELECT publisher, product, q1_spend, q2_spend, q3_spend, q4_spend, q1_to_q2_change_pct, q2_to_q3_change_pct, q3_to_q4_change_pct, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY q4_spend DESC) AS q4_product_rank FROM qoq_changes) SELECT publisher, product, q1_spend, q2_spend, q3_spend, q4_spend, q1_to_q2_change_pct, q2_to_q3_change_pct, q3_to_q4_change_pct, q4_product_rank FROM ranked_products ORDER BY publisher, q4_product_rank
